services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Designing and developing high-performance native (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose) and cross-platform (React Native, KMP) mobile applications.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Development
services.description: Architecting interactive, scalable web platforms using modern React/Next.js frameworks, responsive layouts, and clean codebase structures.

services.title: AI Integration & Automation
services.description: Automating complex workflows and pipelines using n8n and integrating advanced artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities.

services.title: Backend & Cloud Architecture
services.description: Designing secure, production-ready serverless backend solutions and database structures using Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB, and MySQL.
